note: Hand-entered NYC one-off events. Add specific dated events here (e.g. from posters/flyers or curated holiday programming). Each entry needs a stable id, real lat/lon, and ISO local startDateTime / endDateTime with the Eastern offset. Past events are filtered automatically by the pipeline.

events.title: Macy's 4th of July Fireworks 2026 NYC: Free East River Show in Manhattan
events.description: Celebrate July 4th, 2026 with the 50th annual Macy's 4th of July Fireworks lighting up the lower East River by Manhattan's Seaport District and the iconic Brooklyn Bridge. This free, family-friendly spectacle sends tens of thousands of shells over the New York City skyline at dusk. Bring the kids for America's biggest Independence Day fireworks show.
events.venue: Lower East River / Seaport District waterfront

events.title: Nathan's Famous Hot Dog Eating Contest 2026: Coney Island July 4th, Brooklyn
events.description: Watch the world's top eaters battle at the free Nathan's Famous Fourth of July International Hot Dog Eating Contest on the Coney Island boardwalk in Brooklyn. The 2026 women's championship starts at 11 a.m. and the men's at 12:30 p.m., with pre-show music and dancing the whole family will love. A free, only-in-NYC July 4th tradition.
events.venue: Original Nathan's Famous, 1310 Surf Ave (Surf & Stillwell Ave)

events.title: Historic Richmond Town Independence Day Celebration 2026, Staten Island
events.description: Step back in time at Historic Richmond Town's Independence Day Celebration in Staten Island on July 4th, 2026. Families can enjoy crafts, hands-on activities, homemade treats, and living-history fun from 11 a.m. to 4 p.m. A festive, all-ages way to mark America's 250th birthday.

events.title: Intrepid Museum July 4th 2026 NYC: Free Celebrate America's 250th, Manhattan
events.description: The Intrepid Museum at Pier 86 in Manhattan hosts free 'Celebrate America's 250th on the Hudson' programming on July 4th, 2026. Families can enjoy live performances, interactive exhibits, military demonstrations, and the chance to step aboard historic tall ships on the Hudson River. A free, festival-style Independence Day out for all ages.

events.title: South Street Seaport Museum July 4th Fireworks Viewing 2026, Manhattan
events.description: Take in the 50th Macy's 4th of July Fireworks from the South Street Seaport Museum's historic Pier 16 in Lower Manhattan on July 4th, 2026. Gates open at 6:30 p.m. and the fireworks light the sky around 9:25 p.m., viewed beside the museum's tall ships Wavertree and Pioneer. A premium, ticketed riverside viewing experience the whole family can enjoy.

events.title: Intrepid Museum America's 250th Festival 2026: July 3 Free Family Day, NYC
events.description: Kick off July 4th weekend 2026 at the Intrepid Museum's free 'Celebrate America's 250th on the Hudson' festival on Pier 86 in Manhattan. Families can climb aboard visiting tall ships and enjoy live performances, interactive exhibits, and military demonstrations along the Hudson River. Free, family-friendly fun to start the Independence Day holiday.

events.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood at the Bronx Zoo 2026: July 3 Family Day
events.description: Spend the July 4th weekend with your favorite PBS KIDS characters at Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood at the Bronx Zoo in 2026. This kid-friendly experience lets families meet Daniel Tiger while exploring more than 265 acres of wildlife. The Bronx Zoo opens at 10 a.m. for a perfect summer day out with little ones.

events.title: Intrepid Museum July 5 2026: Free Tall Ships & America's 250th, Manhattan
events.description: Wrap up Fourth of July weekend 2026 at the Intrepid Museum's free 'Celebrate America's 250th on the Hudson' festival on Pier 86 in Manhattan. Families can board historic tall ships and take in live performances, interactive exhibits, and military demonstrations on the Hudson River. A free, all-ages way to cap off the holiday.

events.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood at the Bronx Zoo 2026: July 5 Weekend Family Fun
events.description: Close out July 4th weekend 2026 with Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood at the Bronx Zoo, where families meet the beloved PBS KIDS characters. Explore more than 265 acres of wildlife on a relaxed Sunday in the Bronx. Weekend hours run 10 a.m. to 5:30 p.m. for a full day of family fun.
